executives.name: Aida Alvarez
executives.background: Aida Alvarez has served as a member of our board of directors since August 2019. Ms. Alvarez was the Administrator of the U.S. Small Business Administration and a member of President Clinton’s Cabinet from 1997 to 2001.

executives.name: Ajay Singh
executives.background: Ajay Singh has served as our Chief Product Officer since January 2021. Prior to joining Pure, Mr. Singh served as Senior Vice President and General Manager of the Cloud Management Business Unit at VMware, Inc. from 2014 to 2021. Prior to VMware, Mr. Singh held various leadership roles at Hewlett-Packard Company and was the CEO of several startups.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and General Manager, IT Operations Management software business

executives.name: Christoph Schell
executives.background: Christoph Schell is Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer. He joined Intel in 2022 from HP Inc., where he was Chief Commercial Officer. He has over 25 years of experience in the technology industry, including roles at Philips and Procter & Gamble.

executives.name: Dion Weisler
executives.background: Dion J. Weisler has been a director since 2020. He was President and CEO of HP Inc. from 2015 to 2019.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Edward Barnholt
executives.background: Edward Barnholt is the Chairman of the Board of KLA. He was formerly the President and CEO of Agilent Technologies, Inc.

executives.name: Judith Miscik
executives.background: Former CEO and Vice Chairman of Kissinger Associates, Inc.

executives.name: Marc Andreessen
executives.background: Co-founder and General Partner of Andreessen Horowitz.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Margaret Whitman
executives.background: U.S. Ambassador to Kenya; former CEO of Hewlett Packard Enterprise.

executives.name: Michael Capellas
executives.background: Founder and CEO of Capellas Strategic Partners. Former Chairman and CEO of First Data Corporation and Compaq Computer Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Member, Board of Directors / Lead Independent Director

executives.name: Thomas Iannotti
executives.background: Thomas Iannotti has been Chairman of the Board since 2017 and a director since 2011. He was previously Senior Vice President and General Manager, Enterprise Services at Hewlett-Packard Company.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and General Manager, Enterprise Services

executives.name: Yogev Barak
executives.background: Mr. Barak has served as our Chief Product Officer since 2021. Prior to joining SolarEdge, he held various senior management positions at HP Indigo.
